title: Tunisian Tagine with Dates
description: A traditional Tunisian dessert made with sweet dates and a crispy tagine crust. This sweet treat is perfect for any occasion.

ingredients.name: Tagine (or a small ceramic baking dish)

instructions: In a bowl, mix together the dates and sugar.
Add the melted butter or oil to the bowl and mix well.
Pour the date mixture into the tagine or baking dish.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the tagine is golden brown and the dates are caramelized.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
Serve warm, garnished with additional dates if desired.
